---
title: "Carte Carrefour et Utile (zone Grenoble + Nord)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(sf)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(leaflet)
})

normalize_text <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- iconv(x, from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- toupper(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9 ]", " ")
  x <- str_squish(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "N A", "NULL")] <- NA_character_
  x
}

normalize_naf <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_to_upper(str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9]", ""))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  x
}

first_non_empty <- function(df, candidates) {
  out <- rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))
  for (col in candidates) {
    if (!col %in% names(df)) next
    val <- as.character(df[[col]])
    idx <- (is.na(out) | str_trim(out) == "") & !is.na(val) & str_trim(val) != ""
    out[idx] <- val[idx]
  }
  out
}
```

```{r data}
# Repere repo
repo_candidates <- c(".", "..", "../..")
repo_root <- repo_candidates[file.exists(file.path(repo_candidates, ".git"))][1]
if (is.na(repo_root)) repo_root <- "."

cours_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "Cours")

# Source SIRENE (priorite actif -> raw -> data)
sirene_layer <- "dataseed-sirene-1"
sirene_dsn_candidates <- c(
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "actif"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data")
)
sirene_dsn <- sirene_dsn_candidates[
  file.exists(file.path(sirene_dsn_candidates, paste0(sirene_layer, ".shp")))
][1]

if (is.na(sirene_dsn)) {
  stop("Shapefile dataseed-sirene-1.shp introuvable (actif/raw/data).")
}

sirene <- st_read(sirene_dsn, layer = sirene_layer, quiet = TRUE)
names(sirene) <- tolower(names(sirene))

# Zone utilisee dans supermarket_implantation_v3.Rmd
zone_communes <- c(
  "GRENOBLE", "MEYLAN", "LA TRONCHE",
  "CORENC", "SAINT-MARTIN-LE-VINOUX", "SAINT-EGREVE"
)

sirene_zone <- sirene %>%
  mutate(
    commune_norm = normalize_text(commune_de_),
    etat_norm = if ("etat_admini" %in% names(.)) normalize_text(etat_admini) else "ACTIF",
    code_naf = normalize_naf(first_non_empty(
      ., c("activite_pr.1", "activitepri.1", "activiteprincipaleetablissement", "activite_pr", "activitepri", "activite_pr.2")
    )),
    type_pv = case_when(
      code_naf == "4711F" ~ "hyper",
      code_naf == "4711D" ~ "super",
      code_naf %in% c("4711B", "4711C") ~ "superette",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    enseigne = first_non_empty(., c("enseigne_de", "enseigne_de.1", "enseigne_de.2", "enseigne1et")),
    denomination = first_non_empty(., c("denominatio", "denominatio.1", "denominatio.2", "denominatio.3", "denominatio.4")),
    adresse = str_squish(paste(numero_de_v, type_de_voi, libelle_de_, ",", code_postal, commune_de_))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    commune_norm %in% normalize_text(zone_communes),
    etat_norm == "ACTIF",
    !is.na(type_pv)
  )

# Carrefour uniquement (enseigne ou denomination)
carrefour <- sirene_zone %>%
  filter(str_detect(normalize_text(coalesce(enseigne, denomination)), "CARREFOUR"))

if (nrow(carrefour) == 0) {
  stop("Aucun point Carrefour trouve dans la zone.")
}

carrefour <- st_transform(carrefour, 4326)

# Couleur par type de point de vente
carrefour <- carrefour %>%
  mutate(
    color_type = case_when(
      type_pv == "hyper" ~ "#C1121F",
      type_pv == "super" ~ "#005F73",
      TRUE ~ "#0A9396"
    )
  )
```

```{r map}
leaflet(carrefour) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 6,
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    fillColor = ~color_type,
    label = ~paste0("SIRET: ", siret),
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>SIRET:</b> ", siret,
      "<br><b>Enseigne:</b> ", ifelse(is.na(enseigne), "NA", enseigne),
      "<br><b>Denomination:</b> ", ifelse(is.na(denomination), "NA", denomination),
      "<br><b>Type:</b> ", type_pv,
      "<br><b>Code NAF:</b> ", code_naf,
      "<br><b>Adresse:</b> ", adresse
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors = c("#005F73", "#C1121F", "#0A9396"),
    labels = c("Super", "Hyper", "Superette"),
    title = "Type Carrefour",
    opacity = 0.9
  )
```

```{r utile-data}
# Utile uniquement (enseigne ou denomination)
utile <- sirene_zone %>%
  filter(str_detect(normalize_text(coalesce(enseigne, denomination)), "\\\\bUTILE\\\\b")) %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  mutate(
    color_type = case_when(
      type_pv == "hyper" ~ "#C1121F",
      type_pv == "super" ~ "#005F73",
      TRUE ~ "#0A9396"
    )
  )
```

```{r utile-map}
if (nrow(utile) == 0) {
  cat("Aucun point Utile trouve dans la zone.")
} else {
  leaflet(utile) %>%
    addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      radius = 6,
      stroke = FALSE,
      fillOpacity = 0.9,
      fillColor = ~color_type,
      label = ~paste0("SIRET: ", siret),
      popup = ~paste0(
        "<b>SIRET:</b> ", siret,
        "<br><b>Enseigne:</b> ", ifelse(is.na(enseigne), "NA", enseigne),
        "<br><b>Denomination:</b> ", ifelse(is.na(denomination), "NA", denomination),
        "<br><b>Type:</b> ", type_pv,
        "<br><b>Code NAF:</b> ", code_naf,
        "<br><b>Adresse:</b> ", adresse
      )
    ) %>%
    addLegend(
      position = "bottomright",
      colors = c("#005F73", "#C1121F", "#0A9396"),
      labels = c("Super", "Hyper", "Superette"),
      title = "Type Utile",
      opacity = 0.9
    )
}
```

```{r compare-data}
# Comparaison: tous les super/hyper vs points avec drive
crossref_path <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone_v3.csv")
if (!file.exists(crossref_path)) {
  stop("Fichier crossref introuvable: ", crossref_path)
}

crossref <- read_csv(crossref_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(siret = as.character(siret))

super_hyper <- sirene_zone %>%
  filter(type_pv %in% c("super", "hyper")) %>%
  mutate(siret = as.character(siret)) %>%
  st_transform(4326)

drive_points <- super_hyper %>%
  inner_join(
    crossref %>% filter(drive_trouve == TRUE) %>% select(siret, drives_types),
    by = "siret"
  ) %>%
  mutate(drives_types = ifelse(is.na(drives_types) | drives_types == "", "non_precise", drives_types))
```

```{r compare-map}
leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = super_hyper,
    group = "Super/Hyper (zone)",
    radius = 5,
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.55,
    fillColor = "#6C757D",
    label = ~paste0("SIRET: ", siret),
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>SIRET:</b> ", siret,
      "<br><b>Type:</b> ", type_pv,
      "<br><b>Enseigne:</b> ", ifelse(is.na(enseigne), "NA", enseigne),
      "<br><b>Adresse:</b> ", adresse
    )
  ) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = drive_points,
    group = "Avec drive",
    radius = 8,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    color = "#003049",
    fillOpacity = 0.95,
    fillColor = "#00A6FB",
    label = ~paste0("SIRET: ", siret),
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>SIRET:</b> ", siret,
      "<br><b>Type PV:</b> ", type_pv,
      "<br><b>Type drive:</b> ", drives_types,
      "<br><b>Enseigne:</b> ", ifelse(is.na(enseigne), "NA", enseigne),
      "<br><b>Adresse:</b> ", adresse
    )
  ) %>%
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c("Super/Hyper (zone)", "Avec drive"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors = c("#6C757D", "#00A6FB"),
    labels = c("Tous les super/hyper", "Points avec drive"),
    title = "Comparaison",
    opacity = 0.9
  )
```
